items.title: Dillon Mitchell is built to thrive in the Celtics' elite player development program.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
Dillon Mitchell is built to thrive in the Celtics' elite player development program.

The former St. John's captain is a high-character, passionate individual. That blend of enthusiasm and determination came through in his message to his new fan base.

"Willing to die for it."

The 2026 NBA Summer League MVP is... Yaxel Lendeborg of the Warriors!

Lendeborg, the 11th overall pick, averaged 14.8 PPG, 6.8 RPG, and 4.0 APG en route to Golden State becoming NBA Summer League Champions.
